div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Panama (Davis)
div.p: 68. Your 69, October 10, 5 p.m. Honduras has requested cooperation. See mail instruction 69 dated October 1See footnote 8, p. 290. and enclosed instruction same date to Chairman Forbes of Committee.

On same date the Legation at Tegucigalpa was instructed also by mail to ascertain and report so that the engineers might be informed whether it will be agreeable to the Government of Honduras to have the survey begun within that country as soon as or whenever this Government’s engineers may be able or find it convenient to proceed to that country. No reply has yet been received. As soon as it is, you will be informed.
